mapper.select: select id, bid_id, tender_file_id, project_name, requirement_summary, score_items, report_content, parse_status, create_time, update_time from tdw_tender_parse_report where tender_file_id = #{tenderFileId} order by id desc limit 1

select id, bid_id, tender_file_id, project_name, requirement_summary, score_items, report_content, parse_status, create_time, update_time from tdw_tender_parse_report where bid_id = #{bidId} order by id desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into tdw_tender_parse_report(bid_id, tender_file_id, project_name, requirement_summary, score_items, report_content, parse_status, create_time, update_time) values(#{bidId}, #{tenderFileId}, #{projectName}, #{requirementSummary}, #{scoreItems}, #{reportContent}, #{parseStatus}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
